description: Baseline: Build ~3048ms, Tests ~3725ms, Total ~6773ms. 978 tests pass.
Added --minify flag to both build scripts. Result: Test failures in BeadGateway (3 tests failed). Likely unrelated flaky tests or minification broke something. Reverting.

Remove redundant root build of warcraft-core and rely on opencode-warcraft prebuild. Median of 3 runs: 6093ms total (build 2207/2068/2224ms, tests 3886/4013/4084ms). Full suite passed; benchmark script still reports stale test count from first package only.
